localized title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

cast.name: Zoe Simek
cast.character: High School Student at Homecoming Dance

plot outline: Based on the novel written by Stephen Chbosky, this is about 15-year-old Charlie (Logan Lerman), an endearing and naive outsider, coping with first love (Emma Watson), the suicide of his best friend, and his own mental illness while struggling to find a group of people with whom he belongs. The introvert freshman is taken under the wings of two seniors, Sam and Patrick, who welcome him to the real world.
title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
original title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
akas: Las ventajas de ser un marginado (Spain)

other companies.name: Township of Upper St. Clair, Pennsylvania
The Junior Chamber of Commerce Players
